name: Homemade Turkey Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients using a mixing spoon or your hands.
2. Form 1-inch meatballs by rolling the turkey sausage mixture in your hands.
3. Flatten the meatballs with the palm of your hand to form patties.
4. Place sausage patties in a nonstick skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat until they are browned on the bottom, turning with a metal spatula and cooking thoroughly.
6. Remove sausage and drain on paper towels. Serve.
